content.problemStatement:
You are given an undirected tree of NNN nodes. A positive weight WiW_iWi​ is assigned to the node iii for all 1≤i≤N1 \le i \le N1≤i≤N.

For all 1≤j≤N−11 \le j \le N-11≤j≤N−1, the jjj-th edge connects the nodes uju_juj​ and vjv_jvj​, and has a restriction value of RjR_jRj​.

An array A1,A2,⋯ ,ANA_1, A_2, \cdots, A_NA1​,A2​,⋯,AN​ consisting of NNN non-negative integers is called **valid** if:


For all 1≤j≤N−11 \le j \leq N-11≤j≤N−1, the condition Auj+Avj≤RjA_{u_j}+A_{v_j} \le R_jAuj​​+Avj​​≤Rj​ holds.
The **profit** of a **valid** array AAA is defined as profit(A)=∑i=1NAi⋅Wiprofit(A)=\sum_{i=1}^N A_i \cdot W_iprofit(A)=∑i=1N​Ai​⋅Wi​

Find the maximum possible value of profit(A)profit(A)profit(A) for some valid array AAA.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN - the number of nodes in the tree.
The second line of each test case contains NNN integers W1,W2,⋯ ,WNW_1, W_2, \cdots, W_NW1​,W2​,⋯,WN​ denoting the weights assigned to every node.
The next N−1N-1N−1 lines contain three space-separated integers each, with the jjj-th line containing uju_juj​, vjv_jvj​, and RjR_jRj​.


Output Format
For each test case, output the maximum possible value of profit(A)profit(A)profit(A).
constraints: 1≤uj,vj≤N1 \le u_j, v_j \le N1≤uj​,vj​≤N and uj≠vju_j \neq v_juj​=vj​
It is guaranteed that N⋅maxi=1NWi⋅maxj=1N−1Rj≤1018.N \cdot \text{max}_{i=1}^N W_i \cdot \text{max}_{j=1}^{N-1} R_j \le 10^{18}.N⋅maxi=1N​Wi​⋅maxj=1N−1​Rj​≤1018.
It is guaranteed that the input forms a valid tree for all test cases.
The sum of NNN over all test cases do not exceed 10510^5105
